scripts.install-all: npm install && cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install
scripts.dev: concurrently "cd server && npm start" "cd client && npm start" --names "EXPRESS,REACT" --prefix-colors "blue,green"
scripts.dev:full: concurrently "cd server && npm start" "cd client && npm start" "cd ml-service && python app.py" --names "EXPRESS,REACT,ML" --prefix-colors "blue,green,magenta"
scripts.setup:ml: cd ml-service && pip install -r requirements.txt && python train_model.py
